html:
Exclusive to:

Lawn Turf is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires 2 Cut Grass and 1 Nitre to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as fuel.

The Lawn Turf spawns naturally as part of several Set Pieces in the Pig City. These are often surrounded with Hedges and Intricate Topiary.

When placed on the Surface World covering a large enough area, no Birds will spawn and land on these turfs. This turf prevents BFB from landing.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, this Turf will not spawn Puddles. Expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.

Gallery

  • Lawn Turf texture.
  • Wilson standing on placed Lawn Turf in the Pig City.
  • Small patches of Lawn Turf as seen on the Map.

Lawn Turf is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires 2 Cut Grass and 1 Nitre to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as fuel.
The Lawn Turf spawns naturally as part of several Set Pieces in the Pig City. These are often surrounded with Hedges and Intricate Topiary.
When placed on the Surface World covering a large enough area, no Birds will spawn and land on these turfs. This turf prevents BFB from landing.
In the Shipwrecked DLC, this Turf will not spawn Puddles. Expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.

'''Lawn Turf''' is a craftable [[Turfs|Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It requires 2 [[Cut Grass]] and 1 [[Nitre]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as fuel.

The Lawn Turf spawns naturally as part of several [[Set Pieces]] in the [[Pig City]]. These are often surrounded with [[Hedge]]s and [[Intricate Topiary]].

When placed on the Surface World covering a large enough area, no Birds will spawn and land on these turfs. This turf prevents [[BFB]] from landing.

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, this Turf will not spawn [[Flooding|Puddles]]. Expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.
